evals.prompt: /zoto-create-plugin — scaffold a new plugin called zoto-analytics
assertions: A new directory plugins/zoto-analytics/ is created with the required structure
Plugin.json manifest contains name, displayName, version, description, author, license

evals.prompt: /zoto-create-plugin with components: 1 agent, 2 skills, 1 command, 1 rule
assertions: The generated plugin has agents/*.md, skills/*/SKILL.md, commands/*.md, and rules/*.mdc
Each skill has evals/evals.json with >= 2 test cases
All component frontmatter includes required fields (name, description)
